description: Nevermore shepperds Bazaar lounge.. Nevermore shepperds Bazaar lounge.: Nevermore Shepherds Lounge is a wandering ritual space of tea, coffee, puppets, and story. A living lounge where strangers become presences—invited to slow down, connect, and co-create through play, symbols, and shared moments.

Dr. Detangler. Packed in a hurry? String lights became sentient? Jewelry fused into nautical knots? Visit the Sloplandia Detanglery and receive emergency field surgery from a highly unlicensed professional.

Cinder-Fellas and the Playa Princesses. We saw some Disney Princes and Princesses experiencing their first Otherworld! If you find them, stop to say hello, sing a song, dance, get your face painted, become a royal, play a game, or take a portrait! Help them learn about OW! ALL AGES!

camp: Everywhere I am is where the hugs will be. Look for the signs.

description: Bucket Golf or Bust. See a guy in tie dye caddy coveralls? Congratulations, you’ve found wandering bucket golf. Attempt athletic greatness with deeply inadequate equipment in the least prestigious tournament in modern history.
Lemonade stand happy hour!. Your neighbourhood lemonade bar & lounge, serving up fabulously moist libations (boozy + non).

Gestate, Lounge and Rebirth. Immerse yourself in a uterine universe. Embibe amniotic pink drinks, strap on your umbilical cord, rejuvenate. Choose your rebirth style off our menu and be reborn via our glorious vagina slide! And so much more!
The Low Bar Happy Hour. The one and only Low Bar pours open daily from 12–4. Spin the wheel, grab a drink, and enjoy the antics of our legendary bartenders.
Penguinary Air. Fancy yourself an artist? Come and play a game of Penguinary Air while you cool off in our shady chill space. It’s like Pictionary, but with Penguins. No drawing skills required!

description: Indugle Your Census. Thought- provoking questions, daily Oral Administration: form-filling excitement with paper & pencils. Results will be read aloud for the enjoyment of anyone who wishes to Indulge, and catalogued online with previous years’ questions & answers.

Inner Child Post Box Re-Birth through the birth canal. Inner Child Post Box Re-Birth through the birth canal: Arrive at Reframing and transform as you enter the secret door, travel back through the birth canal and re- birth yourself through the vulva and into the Inner Child Post Box then write your inner child a post card. (Open 9am-2am - come by anytime)

Fix-it Station: Open for drop-ins. The place to go to help you express yourself & decommodify by fixin yer shit. We’ve got a bunch of tools (sewing, grommets, rivets, glues, tapes, + more!) and supplies to help you repair your OW finery (or just come hang out and make!)
Mahjong Lounge Open. Mahjong Lounge Open: Pull up a chair, shuffle the tiles, sip tea, and meet strangers who may become camp friends. Beginners welcome; lucky legends tolerated.
Samantha Fox Hour. Come and enjoy the music of the 1980s greatest pop star Samantha Fox. Samantha Fox trivia with prizes.

Last Minute Fix-in Drop-in!. oin us for some accounta-buddying/body doubling and chill crafting/making time at Fix-it, while we finish our own set-up. Avail yourself of our tools and supplies and company. Make a dent in, or even finish, your project/ UFO!

Treasure Box. Come Hither all ye children and inner children to the Inner Child Post Box to find the box of old treasures. There’s one for everyone but leave the rest for your mates. Yarrr. (Open 9am-2am - come by anytime)

Casino of Many Things. Bring your best bartering items to the Casino, test your mind, body and spirit against the house, winner takes all! No item? No problem, tasks can build credit at the Casino. Come on by and try your luck!

Rope Workshop. Gabriel (7 years exp) leads a fun shibari rope workshop. Focusing on connection, safety and consent, learn how to use the humble single column tie for spicy bedroom play. Solo or partnered, everyone is welcome! Bring rope or borrow ours (19+)

Stamped Metal Tag. Come by and use our metal stamps to make yourself a small metal tag (similar to a dog tag). Materials provided for first 50 people; first come first serve. Child friendly with adult assistance.
Shocking Grasp. Looking to bring a spark to your bedroom? A casual introduction to electrical play. Safety, equipment, and the do’s and don’ts. 19+

Sewing Help. Broke a strap, lost a button, ripped yer pants? Get help with mending, repairing, altering or fixing clothes/gear at the Moistly Helpful Help Desk from an experienced seamstress/crafter with an abundance of supplies.
Hot slaps. Show up early. Get slapped. Do it hot.

Herbal Reflections. An interactive herbal installation for self-guided plant meditation. Herbal inctures with plant cards and QR codes invite visitors to choose, taste, and tune inward to learn from each plant through reflection, writing, or drawing, shared or kept.

Dreamwork Pop-Ins. (Ongoing Offering) Have you ever had a dream that really stuck with you? Bring it to the Occult Library and we’ll help you make meaning of it using Jung’s framework of dream interpretation.
Securititties Squad. Look for our squad to “secure your titties”. With consent of course.
The Sound Habitat Grand Opening. We open the psychedelic nightclub! + D3VIANT Dance Party
Meeting of the Jeff’s. Is your name Jeff?ery Geoff? Jefferson? Meet all your namesakes and become reborn as Jeff.
Acroyoga Jam. Casual/chill acroyoga jam session. Not a formal class, but experienced people will be on hand to show some basics. Mats/blankets are helpful, but optional. No partner required.

description: Inner Child Post Box. Inner Child Post Box: Saunter out of the Reframing Art Project filled with inspiration and carry forward to your inner child, a message from the future. We will mail your postcard to you in 9 months’ time (Open 9am- 2am - come by anytime)

Come play mini golf. Immerse yourself in our iridescent glow in the dark forest where you play different size of mini golf holes (giant, medium, miniature), a wishing well, a plink- hole and a Confession-hole (a full size confessional where you can confess your sins get absolution)

Flower Bower Boutique. Deflower us! ...by accessorizing yourself with fabulous clip-on flowers and other faux floral creations at our 24-hour self-service boutique. Dewiness not guaranteed. Floral fashion consultants available spore-adically.

Project HissBark: Seeds of Doubt. Recruiting conspiracy game players who know narrative from counter-narrative. Drain the swamp, rehydrate the bog. Moisture isn’t real. Cryptopreneurs Radically Included <sad emoji>. Wanna play a game? Then, find Improvocateurs with checkered sashes.

Soft Tacos: but make it Hard. The Avocado is friendly but Chipotle smells your fear. Is the Salsa twerking to Darude? The Cheese fell asleep in the sun again. Oh well, it’s a pre-party Picnic. Your mission is to make the taco of your dreams; if you can find it…

NERD INK. hey nerdlinger! opening of the NERD INK temporary tattoo station- nothign compliments a pocket protector better than a hastily applied lower back tattoo. available all weekend, but come early for best choice of designs and help with application

Pogs 4 Applause Lounge Opening Party. We’re flipping the sign to “Open” at 6:00 PM. Come help us kick off the weekend with 90s video games and movies on the big screen. It’s the perfect time to scope out the lounge, find the board games, and get your first rounds of the weekend in.
Ironic Spin’s Big Kick Off Extravanganza. You know you want to start it off right at the 25-foot Boombox. It IS Right. It Does.

SOP Valhalla (19+). Join us in our Tantric Tavern to explore your nauti side! Consent monitors on shift.

Shamanic drum meditation workshop. Learn to travel to your own inner sacred space by yourself and take the map home with you. Open the circle and create an intention
Sensory Dispensary. Wanna lick a stone? See a tune? Touch the unexpected? Explore a living collection of sensations inside the Sensuary.

The Daily Drop-In. Each day, devote some time to intentionally connect with your soma through movement, your breath, touch and sound. Return to the present moment, inhabit your body and senses and just be with whatever is alive for you.

Crafty Breakfast Club. Start the day with a hearty breakfast and a good cranking of your units. Tuck in dangly bits, strengthen bonds, and crank those nuts - we’ve got a wobbly road ahead! We’ll have pancakes, coffee, cranks, bits, and lace - bring your units! Oh, and Jam.

In the (soft,warm) Belly of the Beast. There is so much to explore at Otherworld, but sometimes you need a break - a moment of rest, to wait for something to call to you. Shelter in the (soft, warm) belly of the beast, swaddled, protected, and take a long breath.

Wild Thing Circus!. Step right up and enjoy the circus! Snacks, wonders, games and more. Bring your wildest animal to tame. Puuurfect for young wonders and ringleaders.
Kitty Cat Karaoke. Our Kitty Karaoke station is the purr-fect place to meow it out. Grab a mic, channel your inner feline and belt out your favourite tunes, cat style.
Propagation Station. Feel the earth between your fingers as you plant a new little friend (seed or succulent) in a newly decorated pot done by you!
Oil Wrestling: Epic Of Gilgamesh. Come and participate in a power struggle between friends in a ‘Moist’ coconut oil wrestling ring. Clothing Optional (19+).

Revive & Vibe with Linda. After long nights of dancing, this is a gentle space to come back to your body. We’ll move slow, loosen the joints, wake up the muscles, and just feel good again. You can join half asleep, barefoot...or in a unicorn costume.

Touch Tunnel. Slip Into Something Sensory: At Touch Temple Camp downstairs (look for hand flags and red&gold circus tent), take 10 minutes for a guided journey through fire, water, air, and ground touch. Invigorating, sensory, and a little moist. Wake your boggy senses!

Bohr Dumb, Einstein Smart. A Boring Physics Rant: Come hear Donkey Love rant about how resentful he is of the Copenhagen Interpretation of Quantum Mechanics. Less than 3.14% ad hominem arguments by mass.
Origami with Arnold. Experience the art of origami with Arnie as he guides you through the traditional Japanese art of paper folding.
Electrolyte Elixir Bar. Are you hydrated? Didn’t think so. Come replenish your body chemicals with our proprietary health and mana potions

Clay Play: Throw Pottery Smash Patriarchy. We’ll go over pottery basics. As we shape our clay and explore the joy of making with our hands, we’ll reflect on the systems we want to tear down and channel our energy into the ones we want to build.
Moist Nitro Yerba Mate. Come fill your MUGS with some moist offerings of Nitro Yerba Mate

Sunday funday Pool Party. Blow up the Floaties, bring your lounge chairs, swimsuits, water guns and choose your adventure moistly misted or super soaked? Beat the heat, Kick back relax or bounce that bootie to some pool party beats. CLuGlife guards and thirst aid on duty

The Feeling Map. Collaborative string art project. Each colour holds a feeling. Choose one that feels closest to you, then attach it to the daily map, 3 feeling maps created over 3 days. Return at dusk for the glow.
Trainwrecking. A guide to being a sh*t DJ: A guided exploration of terrible transitions, performer faux pas, and the improper use of air horns

Fix-it Station. Open for drop-ins: The place to go to help you express yourself & decommodify by fixin yer shit. We’ve got a bunch of tools (sewing, grommets, rivets, glues, tapes, + more!) and supplies to help you repair your OW finery (or just come hang out and make!)
Sunday Sundae. Come make an old school ice cream sundae!

Geek-a-Long with Bardy B. The Bards of Level Up+ lead a kitchen party of nerdy-ass music from film, TV, musicals & games. Bring voices to sing along, instruments to accompany (chords avail at bit. ly/bardly) & watch out for pickle- pelting bar goblins!
Temporary Tattoo/Body Adornment Station. Come get prettied up with temporary tattoos and various body adornment offerings

PNP? The fun and wonderful world of chemsex. Drugs and sex go together like peanut butter and... KY Jelly? In this harm reduction workshop we will discuss how to get your rocks off in exciting and colourful new ways!
Ocean Crafts & Drop-In Creative Space. Drop in for some casual ocean-themed arts and crafts! Queer friendly space for creative souls of all ages.
Salon Saloon Sunday. The Salon Saloon is OPEN and it’s been a doozy of a weekend. Looking like you wrestled a cactus? Let our Stylists smooth things out, come on down for a haircut and shenanigans.

Lascivious Life Drawing. Sketch our lovely models in various states of undress and erotic poses. Optional praise or punishment from our two sweet and salty art teachers, who may select your art to be displayed in Smut Café. Beginners welcome! 19+

Dub Roots Science with DJ Klausi. A deep‑roots dub session built on echo, space, and heavy bass pressure. Dub Roots Science channels pure Scientist energy with stripped‑down riddims, swirling delays, and vibrations that shake the dust off your soul.

Dreamwork Pop-Ins. ongoing offering: Have you ever had a dream that really stuck with you? Bring it to the Occult Library and we’ll help you make meaning of it using Jung’s framework of dream interpretation.
Open Mic. Open Mic

The Tinfoil Hat Decompression & Shielding Workshop. Prepare for Re- Entry! The “Default World” is waiting to scan your dusty brain. Join us to reinforce your headgear for the drive home. Patch your leaks, block the highway sensors, and keep the magic in. Don’t let the suburbs read your soul!
Breath & Bass. A DJ-led breathwork journey—let sound guide your breath as we soften, release, and close the Sensuary together.

Touch Your Desires Conversation Cafe. At Touch Temple Camp downstairs (hand flags & red/gold circus tent), pull up a seat at this Café serving a menu of poetry, humor, bad advice, coaching, and consensual touch, all served with empathy and fun.

Non-linear play for flow artists with Ariel Amara. This workshop is for all flow artists & prop manipulators of all kinds! Time to experiment and play outside the box. Expanding beyond the repetitive and the ‘shoulds’, and poke at perfectionism. To help us discover new possibilities.
Sigil/Talisman Making. Create your own magickal artifact, imbued with intention and Olderworldly energies!

WHERE CRIB PUNS COME TO DIE. Come check out the Highest Hand leaderboard as OW wraps up! Taking all comers until we drive away to give WtiF a run for their pretend money. This is your last guaranteed chance to pet the mascots, admire the art & consume snacks and bevvies.

Fusion Dance Intro and Jam. Fusion is partner dancing based on connection, lead-follow principles, consent, and a mix of styles. Short intro warmup followed by many amazing dances with amazing people. Come open-minded and willing to listen and move to the music and each other

Scrap Happy Junk Journals. Scrap Happy Junk Journals is a fun, hands- on workshop where participants transform everyday paper scraps into unique handmade journals using collage, stamping, layering, and simple bookmaking techniques. Ages 8+ (check out @upstyleart for inspo!)

Bleach / Dispersion tie “dye” workshop. Jazz up a tired/thrifted garment using bleach to remove dye, or make some fun patches to repair or cover logos! We have 20+ assorted thrifted shirts size sm-3x to choose from, and patch fabric (or BYO mostly cotton tee). WEAR OLD/ WHITE/NO CLOTHES!
Sketchy Sunday All-Stars. You want to dance? You want to move? You want to know where the brunch just happened but you missed it? THIS IS THE PLACE.

Colouring in the Womb with Julia. Come colour with Julia in the womb just like the good ol’ days! Crayons and paper provided, just bring your beautifully wandering monkey mind and let it land, one color at a time.

Teenager Fashion Advice. You know you look cool but do teenagers think you look cool, too? Want some pointers on how to get more snatched, dripping or steezy? Get fashion advice at the Moistly Helpful Help Desk from some legit teenagers in the know.
Barehanded Spanking Workshop. A workshop for people who are interested in bare-handed spanking but don’t have much experience. Covers safety, techniques, some demos, and some open practice time.

Annoy A Vegan Panel. Ever wondered what the hell a vegan eats and why they are so annoying??? Join us for our Ask A Vegan Panel where you can ask our panel of athletes, artists, and previously arrested activists any of your burning questions! No question is too silly!
Cat and Rat. Miss the glory days of sprinting from fuzzy tyranny? Recreate Cat and Mouse: costumes, squeaky toys, dignity optional.
Slime Wrestling. Channel your inner gastropod and face off in a glistening arena of goo. Slow, slippery, non-toxic, and debatably graceful. Bring a towel!

Straight Outta Cottage - Afternoon Hip Hop. A groove‑rich blend of hip hop and jazz‑soaked rhythm, channeling that classic Tribe warmth. Straight Outta Cottage drops conscious swagger, mellow horns, and beats built for nodding along under glowing festival lights.

Can’t Take it Home: Booze Giveaway. We are giving away our leftover alcohol and water! Please bring your own bottles and we will give out what extra we have left. First come, first served, shared as fairly as possible.

Tavern Tales. Bring Your Own Story: Do you have a story to tell? An adventure to recount? Come share your favorite real-life or fictional tales at The Fizzy Familiar, or enjoy basking in the narratives of other adventurers while sipping on a nice drink!
Sugar High: Epic Cupcakes. Play “Truth or Dare Icing Breakers” + eat the most EPIC cupcake of your life.

A Serious Discussion about Indigeneity. Conversations about the meaning and value of Indigeneity in our reality. We were all Indigenous to somewhere once, and some of us are Indigenous to this land. Come share in what the big deal is. Facilitators present, experienced ones desired.

Chakra Attunement. In this workshop you will learn about your 7 Chakra System from the Root to the Crown, characteristics of each Chakra, and how you interact with each area. Holistic Attunement and Activation through movement, sound, visualization, and meditation.

Slow Energetic Sensual Massage and
Presence.. Learn the art of slow, conscious sensual touch and give your partner the most delightful massage ever! Guided by Lone Peep. ( No genital contact )

Treasure Box. Come Hither all ye children and inner children to the Inner Child Post Box to find the box of old treasures. There’s one for everyone but leave the rest for your mates. Yarrr. (Open 9am-2am - come by anytime)

Stetson road Live loop workshop / performance. Live looping workshop with guitars, bass, banjo, vocals and percussion. Bring your instrument and come play. There will be some small performances to showcase the looping techniques then an open stage for looping and jamming.
Volley Club. Jugglers! Think volleyball but juggling. Bring your own clubs if you have them.
Silly in the sun. Come grab a silly drink at our bar.
Fae Potion Making. Concoct a faire sized potion to remember your magical weekend. Liquids, essential oils, glitter and tiny trinkets provided to make your own Fae charm or perfume bottle.
camp: Fairytale BookHub Café & Trash Fence Kid’s Play Area

description: EMF and Wireless Help. Wish you knew more about EMF and wireless communication? Have concerns that Wifi, cellphones or 5G impact your health? Interested in wireless technology but don’t know where to start? Get answers at the Moistly Helpful Help Desk from a physics SME.
Spank Jousting. Backwards butt slap jousting on hobby horsesback
Flying Fuck: BalkanBeats.

Lube Slip and Slide. Have you ever had the urge to penguin slide down a river of lube? What about boot scoot like a snail? Whatever your sliding fantasies, come slip and slide at the most moist camp at OW.
Thighs vs. Melons. Compete in the watermelon crushing contest! Sticky, sweaty, strong, n slutty! BYOM! 19+
Raunchy Readings. Join Alastair and Dommy Mommy for titillating stories, naughty poetry, and your own saucy selections from our smutty little box. Contributions and participation welcome. 19+

Commie Bop Open Mic: A Commie Bop. a song, a poem, a spell, a skit, a dance against the grind of colonial capitalism. It’s where creativity smashes exploitation, where solidarity squeezes alienation, and where we, the ridiculous and unruly, celebrate our collective fire.
Golden Hour at Thirst Trap. Enjoy a cold sip of homemade brews, refreshments and elixirs on tap at Thirst Trap, including a variety of meads and non-alc options. Live lounge DJ sets to accompany.
Clam Bake. Celebrate 420 at the Pearl Palace with a gaggle of messy mollusks

Pickle Ladies- pickle back slap attack. Ever chased your whiskey with pickle juice? What about with a green paddled spank? The Pickle Ladies will be serving their pickled pleasures! NEON PICKLE to light your way to silly shenanigans!
Spiced Cider/Mead. All natural, liquid inebriants, courtesy of our apple and/or bee friends.
Burlesque hour. Stacked lineup of amazing performers ready to tease and titillate your senses
Jester Performance. Be amazed and entertained by our royal jester!
NERD X. Get Nerdy with us! Open mic for any topic you’re passionate about. Hot Takes with facts. 12+
Sermons by Mother Goldblum. Jeff Welcomes You! Sermons, Jefforcisms and Baptism Service. All faiths welcome. No Nic Cage allowed.

Qi Gong. “Calm Creative Mindful Movement”: Root, restore, and re- energize through calm, conscious movement, breath, and guided meditation—channeling color through correlated Kundalini chakras to clear, calm, and center your core. *Barefoot optional* Leave light, in flow.
Shamanic drum meditation workshop. Learn to travel to your own inner sacred space by yourself and take the map home with you. Close the circle and recall your spirit
Pinata!. Got a little one needing to unleash their inner “Wild Thing”. We’ve got just the thing... our pinata is ready for a swing
Gator: Psychedelic dub-funk trip-hop. A real life band of humans playing musical instruments live!

Inner Child Post Box. Saunter out of the Reframing Art Project filled with inspiration and carry forward to your inner child, a message from the future. We will mail your postcard to you in 9 months’ time (Open 9am- 2am - come by anytime)
Metal takeover. You may not see it coming but you’ll hear it.

Comedy Hour host Patti Savard. Comedy Hour hosted by Patti Savard Get your giggles out with Patti and other great comedy humans! Check in at the camp earlier in the weekend if you’re interested in signing up—we may have a couple of open slots for comedians.
Ask A Plague Doctor. Access the latest, cutting-edge (medieval) medical advice from someone in a bird mask. What could go wrong?

Flower Bower Boutique. Deflower us! ...by accessorizing yourself with fabulous clip-on flowers and other faux floral creations at our 24-hour self-service boutique. Dewiness not guaranteed. Floral fashion consultants available spore-adically.
KD & Cringe Karaoke. The ultimate Sunday fuel-up. We’re serving Kraft Dinner (with purple ketchup and wieners) paired with a heavy dose of 90s Karaoke. Get your fix before heading to the ceremony.
Soup Stockade. Hot soup from a cauldron to warm your weary soul

Friendly CAMP-A-TITION. Bring your campmates for a friendly camp against camp, campatition!Potato sack and 3 legged races, granny pants catching, dogeball, and more winner takes home bragging rights and the 2026 CAMP-A-TITION trophy!!

Healing Ceremony w/ Story and Song. Come share prayers for peace and understanding through story and song. This ceremony is a practice to balance power and unite the sacred feminine and sacred masculine within us and all creation. Open to all genders.
12 Step All Recovery Meeting at Recovery House. 12 Step All Recovery Meeting. Everyone welcome!
Full Power Chai. Full Power Chai: Full power Chai- serving that fire masala chai for your third eye
Curated Live Jam Session.

Otherworldly Elixirs in the Magic Tavern. The famous fae brewers are serving magic drinks out of the Fizzy Familiar. Come get the perfect health potion mixed by fae cunning, or roll the dice and drink down a mystery.

Grief Release Ceremony. Grief Briefly Breathed: Emo Electrically Expressed. A workshop to process grief through intention, live emo music, and somatic kundalini chord cutting. We write, witness, and offer it to the effigy for release and renewal. Grieve.exe

WALK OF THE NEREIDS. A procession in white from the Empress through the OW site, ending at the temple (for the start of the ceremony). We will also post a FB event with more details. Everyone welcome. You must be dresed in white and bring white lights! Children welcome.
TEMPLE CEREMONY. Temple ceremony block. The PDF lists this as “20:00 to 22:30 @ the Effigy on SUNDAY”.
Lords and Lads (19+). Join us in our Tantric Tavern for a SOP lords and lads-themed night. Space is only for people identifying as men.

PartyWolf’s Marquee Metal Montage. Sidle on up to our speaker-wall bar, crush a cold one and bang your head along to the finest selection of metal music OW has to offer while fiddling with some vintage audio gear or literally staring into The (infinity mirror table) Abyss.

The Celestial Ramen Bowl Plounge. Stop by and embody a human noodle in our UMAMI-themed plounge. Commune with the Celestial Ramen Bowl to reveal your ramen fortune. Sundown to sunup all weekend. No ramen, unless you’re lucky.
Cosmic Galaxy. Check out Cosmic after dark for a highly interactive, out of this world experience!
Thai Green Curry Not In A Hurry. A roaming wagon with vegan Thai green curry n rice served by maid’s you probably woudn’t hire
SOP Valhalla (19+). Join us in our Tantric Tavern to explore your nauti side! Consent monitors on shift.

The Parlour of Dubious Decisions. Late-night oracle parlour offering questionable guidance, suspicious prophecies, terrible advice, alter ego transformations, and dramatic exits. spirits say: Do it for the plot. After dark only.
camp: Kitty Noir, The Gypsy Queen. Near the first gates at the very end of the road.

description: CLUB Q. We have bowed to the legends for generations: Berghain; Studio 54; Club Penguin. But even legends must fall. A new era of nightlife oppulence is upon us. Will you cross the line? CLUB Q
Science Theatre. Get your NERD on in our comfy lounge and enlarge your gray matter as your mind is blown by our classic science picks and flicks! Be there and be square!
Be Kind, Rewind. Post-ceremony wind-down. We’ll crown the weekend’s Pog Champion, then cozy up for a 90s film (popular vote). Gushers and Boozy Kool-Aid provided. Bring a chair!
Caldo y sudor. The Cottage is getting steamy. Latin heat, house/ techno, and funk.
Web of Life Listening Party. Come chill with us as we weave in circle and listen to Akira the Don's meaningwave album ft. Alan Watt's words of wisdom about the interconnectedness of life.
Adrian the noise insect. Noise set lets get weird
Soft Landing. Close out gently. Heartspace ambient music for whatever you’re carrying.
Orcar on the Ranch. Orcar resurfaces post-effigy at a new sound stage. The pod goes ‘til dawn. Follow the fluke.

Electric Circus Nights. Liquid-light psychedelia, cosmic projection mapping and kaleidoscopic textures ripple across the tent canopy, transforming the space into a glowing immersive dreamscape all night to fantasticly curated DJs

-SOUND HABITAT ALL-STARS DRIPPY FRESH SEND OFF-. Come down after temple and witness history in the making as the Sound Habitat All-Stars throw down a vibe that will moisten even the driest of tastes, let the atmosphere rinse your soul as we all speak moist farewells till next year.
The People’s Night Parade. After the Effigy Ceremony, join a celebration march of People Power and Art Resistance around Upstairs.
Earthninja: DnB.
fire show. open jam style fire show. open to all safety’s and performers to join as long as you come to our safety meetting at 3pm on sunday june the7th
Just the dregs. We are probably out of booze by this point, unless we have raided another camp! Come on by and drink what’s left.
Dave Dirk can play as long as he wants. Dave Dirk is DJing and we won’t stop him. He’s the one who has to shut down the stage when he’s finished.

Herbal Reflections. An interactive herbal installation for self-guided plant meditation. Herbal inctures with plant cards and QR codes invite visitors to choose, taste, and tune inward to learn from each plant through reflection, writing, or drawing, shared or kept.
Game Night / story time with isaac. as we pack a bit up we will just chill and game and hear stories
Onlychild: Garage.

Galaxy Class with Elfmaster. If we are very lucky, our friend and Ironic Spin Guest VJ extraordinaire will host his legendary Galaxy Class and astound us with the wonders of the cosmos. Come in your cozies, sleeping bags, and pillows and settle in for a galactic adventure.

R|V^H Closing Set @ Electric Circus. Expect deep and delicious Dub Techno and associated soundscapes as R|V^H provides a closing set to our weekend experience. Co-lead of the Ironic Spin Sound Camp, R|V^H is stoked to have been invited to provide a soundtrack to close Electric Circus!
Eat Miso. Can’t remember when you last ate? Feel kinda icky but also like you couldn’t possibly stomach anything right now? We have the solution.
Fun Never Sleeps. It was better next year.
A Shoes on Plounge by Picnic Party. Find Mouth👄 Keep your shoes on👄 Enter Mouth💋
Meeting of the Jeff’s. Is your name Jeff? You belong at this meeting.

CRIB BAR. Always Be Hydrating: MOIST final offerings and electrolytes. Find out what’s in our cooler! If you’re very lucky, some electrolyte freezies might have survived. Guess how big the dry ice block was on day 1. Try to distract us from tear down (spoiler: you’ll succeed).

Pick-up Sticks. Our camp is literally a pile of boards. LNT means a big ol’ game of PICK UP STICKS. Can you pick all the boards up without making other ones move? If you fail? Moistureboarding for you!
